reviews.author: Swetha Somasundaram
reviews.review_body:
We have visited many play schools in and around thudiyalur. We felt that Chuvadu is the best play school. My daughter Ananya was studying PRE KG. The warmth and care from the staff especially Sofiya mam made my daughter feel at home . Play way learning, engaging activities and child-friendly environment have sparked my daughter's curiosity and love for learning.  Maintains excellent hygiene and safe environment. Weekly curriculum update. Constant touch with the parents. In fact my daughter even wants to go to school on holidays also which shows how she loves her time.Correspondent Preetha mam and Sampath sir are very friendly and approachable.
Staffs, especially Vasanti Akka takes care of the kids very well. When my child was unwell, and Vasanti akka made sure she was comfortable, even letting her lie down on her lap for rest. It’s this kind of warmth and personal attention that makes all the difference. Affordable fees. Overall Chuvadu is the perfect school for my daughter's early learning journey.

reviews.author: sneha sneha
reviews.review_body:
Earlier it was little millineum under the same management as of now . My kid did his playgroup and prekg . Earlier it was all fine and we were happy about management. In his pre kg one of co student put scratch marks on his face right below the eyes with safety pin and chart pins ( which were lying here n there inside) . When I noticed at he never accepted his friend did it and later after asking him for hours he confessed. We spoke to management very politely sharing all the images of the mark Askin these and to take care that this doesn't happen again. It again happened for the second time right below his eyes. The management was so rude that She yelled at us saying u cannot talk to parents asking about these and u cannot blame another kid ( not sure if it was some kinda politics ) for this he would have done on the way to home or at home . As we already planned not to continue there we never spoke or wrote about it . Parents please be careful and check if ur kids on Scratch marks of any right after school.
Of course I remember bcz it was my kids first teachers hema and asrin who were excellent and aunties who groomed him . All I would wish to convey is the management was so rude while answering and denied our freedom of speech with other  parents.

No clarification was given but in turn u people cut the call yelling to us without any eithics and morals , another person from from management again called us asking apology .

Dint wanna make this this an issue but it's better that I drop a review so that it will help parents to be cautious .

reviews.author: Shriranjani Ganes
reviews.review_body: Wonderful school, supportive staff and caring teachers.

reviews.author: Niraali Pandurangan
reviews.review_body:
This is my kid’s first school.The teachers and caregivers are kind and understanding.We are happy about the curriculum as well.Preetha Mam and Sampath Sir are doing a wonderful job.

All the best to Chuvadu School.

reviews.author: Jamuna
reviews.review_body: I'm much satisfied of sending my kid to chuvadu.the way they take care and the activities teaching everything is perfect

reviews.author: Janani M
reviews.review_body: My kids attended SummerClass Here.. Awesome dedication & involvement & my kids enjoyed each & everyday's activity. Yoga, Breathing Exercise, Meditation, Fyn Games, Mind Games.. My kids enjoyed everyday. The curriculum is also soo nice ; I highly recommend this school for all our preschoolers. Great Job Chuvadu Team...

reviews.author: Tamizh Selvan
reviews.review_body:
Good choice for preschool. Well maintained environment for kids and care takers were nice on handling kids.

They took good care of my daughter for more than 2 years and she never denied to go to school.  Very well managed team by Preetha mam. A special thanks to Asrin mam who tooks care of my daughter and we felt the special bonding with my daughter during the last week of her school. Good job Preetha mam and Team. Keep going 👍👍
